allow:
Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
Restructure project with complete Azure DevOps CI/CD pipeline and deployment automation

Major cleanup and organization:
- Removed duplicate infrastructure and documentation directories
- Consolidated infrastructure to single infra/ directory
- Removed outdated docs/ directory with 40+ redundant files
- Organized deployment scripts and guides at root level

New Azure DevOps CI/CD pipeline:
- Complete 5-stage pipeline with build, test, and deployment
- Automated backend \(.NET\) and frontend \(React\) builds
- Infrastructure deployment with Bicep templates
- Database migrations and smoke tests
- Pipeline variable setup automation

Enhanced deployment scripts:
- setup-entra-apps.ps1: Comprehensive Entra ID app registration with Microsoft best practices
- deploy-dev.ps1: Updated with correct paths and tenant configuration
- setup-azure-devops-variables.ps1: Automated pipeline variable configuration

Comprehensive documentation:
- DEPLOYMENT-GUIDE.md: Complete step-by-step deployment guide
- README-DEPLOYMENT.md: Technical overview and architecture
- .azuredevops/README.md: CI/CD pipeline setup guide
- ENTRA-QUICK-REFERENCE.md & ENTRA-SETUP-README.md: Quick reference guides

Configuration:
- Tenant ID: 7db28d6f-d542-40c1-b529-5e5ed2aad545 \(Diepenbeek\)
- App registrations: Djoppie-Inventory-Backend-API-DEV, Djoppie-Inventory-Frontend-SPA-DEV
- Single sign-on with Microsoft Entra ID
- Minimal cost setup \(€6-10/month DEV environment\)

All scripts follow Microsoft best practices with OAuth 2.0 + PKCE for SPA,
proper API scope exposure, and secure secret management.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")

Bash(powershell -Command "Invoke-Sqlcmd -ServerInstance ''sql-djoppie-inventory-dev-k5xdqp.database.windows.net'' -Database ''sqldb-djoppie-inventory-dev'' -Username ''sqladmin'' -Password ''Dj0ppenbeek026'' -Query ''ALTER TABLE AssetTemplates ALTER COLUMN Category NVARCHAR\(100\) NULL;'' -Encrypt")

Bash(powershell -Command "Invoke-Sqlcmd -ServerInstance ''sql-djoppie-inventory-dev-k5xdqp.database.windows.net'' -Database ''sqldb-djoppie-inventory-dev'' -Username ''sqladmin'' -Password ''Dj0ppenbeek026'' -Query ""SELECT COLUMN_NAME, IS_NULLABLE, DATA_TYPE, CHARACTER_MAXIMUM_LENGTH FROM INFORMATION_SCHEMA.COLUMNS WHERE TABLE_NAME = ''AssetTemplates'' AND COLUMN_NAME = ''Category'';"" -Encrypt")

Bash(powershell -Command "Invoke-Sqlcmd -ServerInstance ''sql-djoppie-inventory-dev-k5xdqp.database.windows.net'' -Database ''sqldb-djoppie-inventory-dev'' -Username ''sqladmin'' -Password ''Dj0ppenbeek026'' -Query ""SELECT TOP 3 MigrationId, ProductVersion FROM __EFMigrationsHistory ORDER BY MigrationId DESC;"" -Encrypt")

Bash(powershell.exe -Command "$token = az account get-access-token --resource https://database.windows.net/ --query accessToken -o tsv; $conn = New-Object System.Data.SqlClient.SqlConnection; $conn.ConnectionString = ''Server=sql-djoppie-inventory-dev-k5xdqp.database.windows.net;Database=sqldb-djoppie-inventory-dev;''; $conn.AccessToken = $token; $conn.Open\(\); $cmd = $conn.CreateCommand\(\); $cmd.CommandText = ''SELECT name FROM sys.columns WHERE object_id = OBJECT_ID\(''''RolloutWorkplaces''''\)''; $reader = $cmd.ExecuteReader\(\); while\($reader.Read\(\)\) { Write-Host $reader[0] }; $conn.Close\(\)")
